title: Fun Additions
body:
This mod adds some fun little things to the game, right now it's not very big but I do intend to change that.

 

so far the mod includes, rubies!!!, ruby item, ruby ore, ruby deepslate ore, ruby block, and all ruby items, note that there is no ruby armor yet that is planned to come soon

it also has lanterns THAT YOU CAN TURN OFF!!! I know that should be in the base game, but alas it is not, theirs also not any other mods I can find that do that soooo I did :D

now my lantern block does replace the base games lantern block, sorry! meaning that if you have a world with lanterns this mod will not affect those, but the crafting recipe for lanterns has been replaced with my lantern :D

 

also I hate mining, like sooooooo much, so guess what? rubies solve that!

they have around the durability of iron, and the mining speed of.. well insta break (for most blocks not all), it's mining speed is 250!

is this OP? imo no, mining sucks is long is boring and it makes me not want to play minecraft, infact one of the reasons I don't play minecraft a lot is because of the mining, so rubies fix this!

 

does this mean diamonds are useless? and netherite? yep!

both have 0 uses has rubies has a minin power of 4, meaning they mine better then netherite, why did I do this? because I HATE MINING :D

 

will I add things to replace diamonds and netherite? well not replace they'll still be in the game just useless lol, but I will add more ores/items that will be better then rubies, and more blocks that are actuilly usefull to have rubies to get/mine. hence the mining level of 4.
